calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2007 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Summons And Service Of Process On Deft Yin Howan
Off Calendar Nov-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT YIN HOWAN'S Motion To Quash Summons And Service Of Process is granted. Plaintiff has not carried burden of showing that service was made at usual mailing address given defendant's declarations. In any event, repeated visits to address at which defendant does not reside does not satisfy reasonable diligence requirement. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/JF) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-23-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Apr-05-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 220

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2006 Off Calendar
